text.en: DeepMind’s AlphaFold2 achieved a major jump in protein structure prediction at CASP14 by combining evolutionary information, attention-based representations, and end-to-end structure refinement. It showed how deep learning could transform a long-standing scientific problem.
text.zh: DeepMind 的 AlphaFold2 在 CASP14 蛋白质结构预测中取得重大跃升，结合进化信息、基于注意力的表示和端到端结构优化。它展示了深度学习如何改变长期存在的科学难题。

text.en: Highly accurate protein structure prediction with AlphaFold
text.zh: 使用 AlphaFold 进行高精度蛋白质结构预测
